title: Nigeria’s Q3 2025 Media Sentiment Analysis: Reputation as the New Currency of Trust - FinancialEDGE
description: As Nigeria’s media environment continues to evolve, brand sentiment has emerged as a key indicator of reputation, revealing how corporate narratives influence public confidence, trust, and market perception. A new report by P+ Measurement Services, Nigeria’s leading independent media intelligence consultancy, provides a data-backed analysis of how reputational factors shaped public narratives across the banking, insurance, and telecommunications sectors
html: As Nigeria’s media environment continues to evolve, brand sentiment has emerged as a key indicator of reputation, revealing how corporate narratives influence public confidence, trust, and market perception.
